detaileddescription.para: Initialises the shared LUT on first call (thread-safe concern: use from a single thread or call lo_create() before spawning threads).

parameterdescription.para: Normalised frequency (cycles per sample). Any value; fractional part used internally.

simplesect.para: Heap-allocated state, or NULL on allocation failure.

detaileddescription.para: Free all resources. May be NULL (no-op).
Zero the phase accumulator. norm_freq is unchanged.

briefdescription.para: Maximum samples per call (determines pre-allocated buffer size).
Generate n CF32 phasors at the current norm_freq.

detaileddescription.para: Output is emitted before increment: out(0) corresponds to the phase at entry, out(1) to phase + phase_inc, etc. Returns n.

memberdef.argsstring: (lo_state_t *state, const float *ctrl, size_t ctrl_len, float complex *out)
memberdef.name: lo_steps_ctrl

briefdescription.para: Generate CF32 phasors with per-sample FM deviation.

detaileddescription.para: ctrl(i) (real float, fractional part used) is converted to a per-sample phase-increment delta added on top of the base phase_inc. The base norm_freq is not modified.
Output length equals ctrl_len. Returns ctrl_len.

briefdescription.para: Local oscillator: NCO + 2^16 sin/cos LUT → CF32 phasors.

detaileddescription.para: Re-implemented from the doppler reference (native/src/lo/lo_core.c). Algorithm and AVX-512 paths are identical; the state struct and API use doppler conventions (double norm_freq, jm property names).
